allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\(''RASMI_sofian_ecf3.ipynb'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f: nb = json.load\(f\) for i, cell in enumerate\(nb[''cells'']\): if cell[''cell_type''] == ''code'': src = ''''.join\(cell[''source'']\) print\(f''=== Cellule code {i} ===''\) print\(src[:500]\) print\(\) elif cell[''cell_type''] == ''markdown'': src = ''''.join\(cell[''source'']\) print\(f''=== Cellule markdown {i} ===''\) print\(src[:300]\) print\(\) ")
